label: Fish chance
description: Associates a fish ThingDef with a relative catch chance. The XML element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the chance.

fishDef.label: Fish def
fishDef.description: ThingDef of the fish. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Relative catch chance weight for this fish. Populated from XML scalar text by the keyedObjectList loader.
